violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink. Inspector showed the person in charge how to make a chlorine sanitizing solution. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Milk was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit on the table near the coffee. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, milk had been out for 2 hours. Milk was relocated to refrigeration during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation in the walk-in cooler and refrigerator. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
